name: Triple Onion Walnut Pate
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium sized red onions, thinly sliced
3 Scallions, cut into 1-inch pieces (use white and green parts)
14 1/2 oz can asparagus cuts, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, fry the red and yellow onions in hot oil until golden.
2. Lower the heat and cook for 2 to 3 more minutes until the onions are limp but not browned.
3. Add scallions and heat through.
4. Cool slightly, then transfer everything to a food processor with walnuts, eggs, asparagus, cumin, paprika, and salt.
5. Pulse to combine and season with pepper to taste.
6. Spoon into a bowl and chill until ready to serve.
Makes 2 1/2 cups. To serve: Scoop onto lettuce-lined plates. Garnish with black olives and cherry tomatoes. Serve with matzos.
